axisId.description: Id of the rotation axis to render. If not provided, it will use the first defined rotation axis.

className.description: A CSS class name applied to the root element.

disableLine.description: If true, the axis line is not rendered.

disableTicks.description: If true, the ticks are not rendered.

position.description: The position of the rotation axis. It can be 'inside' or 'outside'.

tickLabelPosition.description: Set the position of the tick labels relative to the axis line. 'after' places them outside the arc, 'before' inside.

tickPosition.description: Set the position of the tick relative to the axis line. 'after' places them outside the arc, 'before' inside.

tickSize.description: The size (in pixels) of the tick marks.
